events.title: Moving Waves — 5Rhythms with Jada Jane Boh & Sophie Daubisse
events.description: A weekly 5Rhythms Waves class led by certified facilitators Jada Jane Boh and Sophie Daubisse, held every Tuesday afternoon at Paradiso Ubud. Grounded in the Gabrielle Roth lineage, Moving Waves offers deepened physical expression through the essential 5Rhythms and their polarities — Wave, Staccato, Chaos, Lyrical, and Stillness. A structured practice format, not a DJ-led open floor: the facilitator guides the room through the full wave arc. Drop-in or 5-class pass.
events.short_description: 5Rhythms Wave practice with certified facilitators Jada Jane Boh and Sophie Daubisse. Weekly Tuesdays 3–5 PM at Paradiso Ubud.

events.title: Elixir of the Gods: Blue Lotus Winter Solstice Ceremony
events.description: An annual ceremony at Pyramids of Chi timed to the Winter Solstice moment (11:31 AM Bali time, June 21). The Blue Lotus — known as the 'Elixir of the Gods' and served to the priesthood of ancient Egypt — is offered as a ceremonial tea. The full ceremony includes a blessing with temple incense, a fire ritual for new solstice intentions, Blue Lotus tea served in ceremony, voice activation for energy harmonisation, and a deep cosmic Sound Healing journey through Alchemy Crystal Singing Bowls, gongs, and sacred instruments within the Pyramid of the Earth. A distinct annual ceremony — not the venue's daily tourist sessions.
events.short_description: Annual solstice ceremony with Blue Lotus tea, fire ritual, and cosmic sound healing inside the sacred Pyramids of Chi. Daytime, timed to the solstice.
events.venue_address: Jl. Raya Lungsiakan, Kedewatan, Ubud, Bali
events.price_info: IDR 350,000–500,000 approx. — confirm and book at pyramidsofchi.com or events@pyramidsofchi.com

events.title: Full Moon Ceremony — Pyramids of Chi
events.description: Pyramids of Chi's monthly full moon ceremony, held faithfully on the full moon each month. The evening opens with a fire ceremony honouring the four directions — preparing body and field for the deep sound journey to follow inside the Pyramid of the Sun. Ancient Sound Healing (gongs, crystal bowls, and sacred instruments) forms the heart of the ceremony. The evening concludes with a 3-course vegan dinner. This is a community gathering — not the venue's daily tourist product. Sells out each month; advance booking essential.
events.short_description: Monthly full moon ceremony at Pyramids of Chi: fire ritual, deep sound healing journey, and 3-course vegan dinner. Next: June 29.
events.venue_address: Jl. Raya Lungsiakan, Kedewatan, Ubud, Bali
events.price_info: IDR 400,000 approx. — confirm and book ahead at pyramidsofchi.com (sells out monthly)

events.title: Cacao Somatic Restorative Sound Bath — Heart Space Bali (Sunday Morning)
events.description: A Sunday morning ceremony at Heart Space Bali pairing ceremonial cacao with somatic restorative movement and deep sound healing. Long-held restorative poses supported by cushions, bolsters, and props ease the body into full receptivity — no effort, only softening. Crystal and Tibetan singing bowls slow the brainwaves, calm the nervous system, and allow the entire being to unwind. The cacao opens the heart. A distinct offering from the Friday evening ceremony at the same venue — morning format, somatic-restorative structure, and a meditative rather than ceremonial arc.
events.short_description: Sunday morning cacao, somatic restorative movement, and crystal bowl sound healing at Heart Space Bali. Weekly, 11:30 AM, IDR 250,000.
events.price_info: IDR 250,000 — advance booking required (class may cancel if no bookings received)
